scope.mutation_policy: insert_only_for_new_outcomes; existing current-admin source metadata is refreshed from canonical policy_outcome_sources

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Reduce the federal crack-powder sentencing disparity
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Federal law reduced the crack-to-powder cocaine sentencing disparity from 100-to-1 to 18-to-1.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Advance racial equity across federal agencies
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: The federal government created an equity review framework, but implementation remained uneven across agencies and over time.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Restore stronger federal voting-rights protections
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: No federal voting-rights restoration law was enacted despite high-profile legislative pushes.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Deliver stronger anti-redlining and Black homeownership gains
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: No durable anti-redlining or Black homeownership enforcement framework matching the public promise was delivered.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Increase federal policing accountability standards
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Federal policing reform remained active as a national policy priority, but Congress did not complete a durable statutory settlement.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Close Guantanamo Bay detention facility
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: The administration reduced the detainee population and repeatedly pursued closure, but Guantanamo remained open.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: End combat-brigade deployment in Iraq
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Combat brigades were withdrawn and the formal combat mission ended, but the broader conflict and later U.S. re-engagement undercut the full promise frame.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Repeal Don't Ask, Don't Tell
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: The policy was repealed and openly gay and lesbian Americans were allowed to serve in the military.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Ban pre-existing-condition exclusions
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Federal law established broad insurance protections for people with pre-existing medical conditions.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Enact a credit card bill of rights
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Federal law placed new limits on retroactive rate hikes and several abusive billing practices.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Restore the ability to challenge pay discrimination
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Workers gained a renewed ability to file claims based on each discriminatory paycheck rather than only the original pay decision.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Enact a worker tax credit
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Workers received federal tax relief, but the policy was time-limited and later replaced by other tax-cut mechanisms.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Expand children's health insurance coverage
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Federal children's health coverage was expanded through reauthorization and program growth.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Ease federal restrictions on embryonic stem cell research
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Federal policy was changed to allow broader support for embryonic stem cell research subject to legal and ethical rules.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Roll back Bush tax cuts for upper-income households
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Top-end Bush tax cuts were partially rolled back, but the final result came as a negotiated compromise.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Withdraw the United States from TPP
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: The United States formally withdrew from TPP negotiations.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Build a southern border wall and make Mexico pay
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Barrier construction advanced in some places, but the core promise that Mexico would pay and that a comprehensive wall would be built was not met.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Exit the Paris climate agreement
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: The United States exited the Paris Agreement before later rejoining under Biden.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Move the U.S. embassy in Israel to Jerusalem
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: The U.S. embassy was moved to Jerusalem, delivering the central promise.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Replace NAFTA with a new trade deal
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: NAFTA was replaced by USMCA.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Appoint conservative Supreme Court justices
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Trump delivered on the promise to appoint conservative Supreme Court justices.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Repeal and replace the Affordable Care Act
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: The Affordable Care Act was not repealed, though some regulatory and tax changes weakened parts of the law.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Impose a travel ban on targeted countries
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: A narrower set of country-based travel bans took effect after legal challenges, but the original campaign wording was not implemented as stated.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Deliver a major federal tax cut
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Trump delivered a large tax cut package centered on corporate-rate reduction and broad tax changes.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Pass federal criminal justice reform
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Federal sentencing and prison-policy reforms were enacted through the First Step Act.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Rejoin the Paris climate accord
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: The United States rejoined the Paris Agreement early in Biden's term.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Revoke the Keystone XL pipeline permit
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: The Keystone XL project was stopped after the permit revocation.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Nominate the first Black woman to the Supreme Court
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Jackson was confirmed and became the first Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Forgive public-college tuition debt for many borrowers
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Biden delivered substantial targeted debt relief, but the original broad promise was only partially achieved after the Supreme Court blocked the administration's main plan.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Advance racial equity across the federal government
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: The administration established a federal equity framework, but implementation remained uneven and administratively vulnerable.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Pass a bipartisan infrastructure package
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: The administration delivered a major infrastructure law with long-term federal spending commitments.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Reverse the ban on transgender military service
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Transgender Americans regained the ability to serve openly in the military.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Deliver 100 million COVID-19 vaccine shots in the first 100 days
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: The administration met and then exceeded the original 100 million shot target within the first 100 days.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Raise the federal minimum wage to $15
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: No federal $15 minimum wage was enacted during Biden's term.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Strengthen federal labor protections
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Federal labor policy moved in a more worker-friendly direction administratively, but major legislative reform did not become law.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Launch a homeowner stabilization and foreclosure-prevention effort
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: The administration created a much larger foreclosure-relief framework than promised, but the homeowner-stabilization effort underperformed and failed to prevent broad foreclosure damage.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Ban deceptive election practices and voter intimidation
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: The specific federal legislation to penalize deceptive election practices and require corrective federal action never became law.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Ensure long-term federal funding for HBCUs
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Trump delivered notable federal support to HBCUs through executive attention and the FUTURE Actâ€™s long-term funding framework.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Increase access to affordable housing
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Biden increased housing assistance and launched a federal housing-supply agenda, but the broader affordable-housing platform was only partially realized.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Make HBCUs and under-resourced MSIs more affordable
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Biden delivered major federal support to HBCUs and other minority-serving institutions and paired that with student-relief steps, but he did not enact the full tuition-grant vision described in the campaign promise.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Restore voting rights after felony sentences are completed
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: The administration supported broader voting-rights legislation, but it did not create the promised incentives for states to automatically restore voting rights after felony sentences are completed.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Make it easier for workers to unionize
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: The labor-law reform promised through the Employee Free Choice Act did not become federal law.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Make no cuts to Medicaid
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Trump did not keep the promise to avoid Medicaid cuts, as repeal efforts and budget proposals repeatedly put the program at risk.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Offer a public option health insurance plan
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: No national public-option health plan was enacted during Biden's presidency.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: End the federal use of private prisons and detention centers
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Biden partially reduced the federal use of private prisons, but the broader federal detention system did not fully exit private detention contracts.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Eliminate cash bail
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: No national federal policy eliminating cash bail was enacted during Biden's presidency.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Direct 40 percent of key clean-energy benefits to disadvantaged communities
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Biden created the Justice40 framework and linked it to major federal investment programs, but implementation quality and measurable benefit delivery remained uneven.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Suppress Ku Klux Klan violence and protect Black voting rights
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Grant used expanded federal enforcement powers against Ku Klux Klan violence, producing a concrete period of federal protection for Black voting rights during Reconstruction.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Pass the Voting Rights Act after Selma
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Johnson delivered the central promise by helping secure and sign the Voting Rights Act of 1965.

skipped_duplicates.promise_title: Pass federal fair-housing protections
skipped_duplicates.outcome_summary: Johnson delivered federal fair-housing protections through enactment of the Fair Housing Act in 1968.
